name: Chick Pea and Spinach Soup
recipeIngredient: 16 oz can chick peas, drained and rinsed
4 cups fresh spinach, rinsed, dried, and shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the onion and garlic over low heat, covered, until the onion is translucent.
2. Add the milk and raise the heat to medium, stirring constantly. Cook until a boil is just reached.
3. Add the chick peas, spinach, and spices, and continue to cook and stir.
4. When the spinach is completely wilted, remove a cup and a half of the soup to a blender and puree.
5. Return the puree to the soup, stir well, and serve hot. Makes 4 servings.
